case_title: GUILLERMO URBINA VS. TOYOTA MOTOR SALES, USA, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF URBINA, GUILLERMO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TOYOTA MOTOR SALES, USA, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF URBINA, GUILLERMO AS TO DEFENDANT TOYOTA MOTOR SALES, USA, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-01-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: AL ANOLIK. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF NAD DEFENDANT. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MANTI HENRIQUEZ PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY URBINA, GUILLERMO AS TO DEFENDANT TOYOTA MOTOR SALES, USA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
